mano_cua.result_summary: 无法测试单曲循环+歌词快进功能。音乐播放器需要后端 API（网易云音乐 API，端口 3000）但未运行，导致无法搜索或播放任何歌曲。mano-cua 花费 52 步尝试各种方式播放音乐均失败，超 80 步上限后手动终止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Backend API server at port 3000 is not running (ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED). Without the backend, the app cannot search or play any songs. All attempts to find playable content failed - home page shows empty sections, search returns no results, list page shows loading spinner indefinitely.
